title: centella thesioides
intro: Centella thesioides, also known as Gotu Kola or Indian Pennywort, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anticoagulant activities. The health benefits of Centella thesioides include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and enhancing skin health by promoting wound healing and reducing the appearance of scars. Centella thesioides can be consumed as a herbal tea, capsule, or supplement, or applied topically as a cream or oil to reap its numerous benefits.
